ddls:
CREATE TABLE "office_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product edition */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the Microsoft Office edition (e.g., ProPlus, Business) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the edition was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product edition */,
  "version" TEXT /* Specific version of the Office edition */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the product will no longer be supported */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Perpetual, Subscription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_types" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation type */,
  "installation_type" TEXT /* Type of installation (e.g., Offline, Online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the installation type */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* Detailed system requirements for the installation type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this installation type is the default for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system architecture */,
  "os_architecture" TEXT /* Operating system architecture (e.g., x64, x86) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system architecture */,
  "operating_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "minimum_ram" INTEGER /* Minimum RAM required for the OS architecture */,
  "minimum_disk_space" INTEGER /* Minimum disk space required for the OS architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_installations" (
  "product_installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product installation combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product edition */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the installation type */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating system architecture */,
  "installation_link" TEXT /* Link to the installation file or instructions */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the installation combination is officially supported by Microsoft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_installations_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installation_types ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_installations_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_installations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES office_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "customer_size" TEXT /* Size of the customer organization (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "main_contact" TEXT /* Main contact person for the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the license */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product edition */,
  "license_count" INTEGER /* Number of licenses purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the license was purchased */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "is_renewed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the license has been renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was last renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_licenses_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES office_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_licenses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer where the deployment occurred */,
  "product_installation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product installation combination */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the product was deployed */,
  "deployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of installations deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Failed) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_deployments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_deployments_product_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_installation_id") REFERENCES product_installations ("product_installation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product edition */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the update was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the update is critical */,
  "is_automatic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the update can be installed automatically */,
  "update_link" TEXT /* Link to the update file or installation instructions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_updates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES office_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_deployments" (
  "update_deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update deployment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer where the update was deployed */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software update */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the update was deployed */,
  "deployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of update installations deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the update deployment (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Failed) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the update deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_deployments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_deployments_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES software_updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
